= ceil

Rounds a number up to the nearest integer. Returns an integer if the result fits in 64-bit, otherwise returns a float.


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.new_value = this.value.ceil()

# In:  {"value":5.3}
# Out: {"new_value":6}

# In:  {"value":-5.9}
# Out: {"new_value":-5}
----

[,bloblang]
----
root.result = this.price.ceil()

# In:  {"price":19.99}
# Out: {"result":20}
----
